name: session-devtools
description: Local devtools for AI coding sessions. Claude Code first.
author: tony-shi <realshihuashen@gmail.com>

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.build:client: cd client && npm run build && rm -rf ../dist/public && cp -r ../server/public ../dist/public
scripts.voice:agent-loop:zh: npx tsx scripts/voice/synth.ts agent-loop --lang zh --provider mock
scripts.voice:agent-loop:en: npx tsx scripts/voice/synth.ts agent-loop --lang en --provider mock
scripts.voice:agent-loop:zh:gemini: npx tsx scripts/voice/synth.ts agent-loop --lang zh --provider gemini
scripts.voice:agent-loop:en:gemini: npx tsx scripts/voice/synth.ts agent-loop --lang en --provider gemini
scripts.voice:agent-loop:zh:minimax: npx tsx scripts/voice/synth.ts agent-loop --lang zh --provider minimax
scripts.voice:agent-loop:en:minimax: npx tsx scripts/voice/synth.ts agent-loop --lang en --provider minimax
scripts.voice:agent-loop:zh:google: npx tsx scripts/voice/synth.ts agent-loop --lang zh --provider google
scripts.voice:agent-loop:en:google: npx tsx scripts/voice/synth.ts agent-loop --lang en --provider google
scripts.voice:watch:agent-loop: npx tsx scripts/voice/watch.ts agent-loop --langs zh,en --provider mock
scripts.voice:watch:agent-loop:gemini: npx tsx scripts/voice/watch.ts agent-loop --langs zh --provider gemini
scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "if (process.env.PUBLISH_FROM_SCRIPT !== '1') { console.error('ERROR: Use scripts/publish.sh instead of npm publish directly.'); process.exit(1); }"
